method: manual web recon — WebSearch + WebFetch · no paid enrichment APIs
two_source_rule: A decision-maker is Tier A only if name + company appear in ≥2 independent public sources (e.g. company site + press; LinkedIn + BBB; About page + chamber). Single-source = Tier B. No source = Tier C (needs Apollo).
